name: Freebies
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: Freebies]"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Freebies are products that are given away for free when another product is purchased. Customers who purchase the product will also get the free products listed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Parent products and gift vouchers are not supported as freebies. The individual variations should be added instead."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install the Freebies Add-on"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install the add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the product management section, find the "}, {"text": "Freebies", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on and click the Install button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Confirm by clicking the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up that appears."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once installed the Freebies section will appear on all products in your control panel:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Freebies to Products"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Freebies has the benefit of displaying the free product(s) the customer will choose from when on the shopping cart page."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Products", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Edit the product you wish to make changes to."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to the "}, {"text": "Freebies", "bold": true}, {"text": " section."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the field under "}, {"text": "Add Related Product", "bold": true}, {"text": " and enter either the product SKU or part of the product name. A list of the products that match what you have entered."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the product from the list. You can add more than one product."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save changes", "bold": true}, {"text": ". When the product is added to the shopping cart, the customer can choose which of the free products they want to add to their order."}]}]}]}]
